title: helianthus californicus
intro: Helianthus californicus, also known as California sunflower, is a perennial wildflower native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The medicinal properties of Helianthus californicus include its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and antioxidant, as well as its antimicrobial and antifungal properties. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve skin and hair health, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Helianthus californicus can be made into teas, infusions, or salves, and are often used to treat skin conditions, wounds, and digestive issues.
